title: Update Location Address to Thuckalay, Kanyakumari District

requirements.summary: Update the Location section and Footer to display the correct facility address: Thuckalay, Kalkulam Taluk, Kanyakumari District, Tamil Nadu – 629175, India
acceptanceCriteria: The Location section displays 'Thuckalay, Kalkulam Taluk, Kanyakumari District, Tamil Nadu – 629175, India' as the facility address.
No placeholder address text remains in the Location section.
The interactive map marker popup label also reflects the updated address or facility name with the correct location.
The Footer component, if it displays an address, is also updated to reflect Thuckalay, Kanyakumari District, Tamil Nadu – 629175, India.
The existing interactive map coordinates (8.120236, 77.454371), maritime theme styling, and info cards are preserved unchanged.

file_operations.description: Replace any existing placeholder or previously shown address text with 'Thuckalay, Kalkulam Taluk, Kanyakumari District, Tamil Nadu – 629175, India' in all address display elements, info cards, and the OpenStreetMap iframe marker popup label. Preserve the existing map coordinates (8.120236, 77.454371), maritime navy/seafoam theme styling, hours info card, landmark info card, and overall layout structure.

Update the address displayed in the Footer brand column to 'Thuckalay, Kalkulam Taluk, Kanyakumari District, Tamil Nadu – 629175, India'. Preserve all existing contact details (phone numbers and email), quick links, services list, and copyright notice.
